sourceMovie.title: Ne Zha 2
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Ne Zha 2 (2025) stuck because it commits to its animation premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Jiao Zi's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The animation and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Raya and the Last Dragon
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Ne Zha 2 clicked for you, Raya and the Last Dragon (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and fantasy, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Ne Zha 2?
faq.answer: Try Raya and the Last Dragon, The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim, Green Snake—each shares DNA with Ne Zha 2 while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Ne Zha 2?
faq.answer: Ne Zha 2 (2025) is best described as Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Action. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Ne Zha 2 part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Ne Zha Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
